headline: Why A. O. Smith (AOS) Stock Is Trading Up Today
summary: Shares of water heating and treatment solutions company A.O. Smith (NYSE:AOS) jumped 4.4% in the afternoon session after the company announced Executive Chairman Kevin Wheeler will retire on July 1, with President and CEO Stephen Shafer elected to succeed him as chairman.
